full_text:
Xu Zhen 徐真
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Zhen (徐真)was born in Wu. Close friend of Sun Jian, married Jian’s younger sister. Xu Zhen was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
